basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum first class bachelor's degree in chemical engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Chemistry, Physics and other related disciplines
qualification.details: Minimum first class bachelor's degree in chemical engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Chemistry, Physics and other related disciplines.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment is 10th June 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a minimum first-class bachelor's degree in chemical engineering, mechanical engineering, chemistry, physics, or other related disciplines to be eligible for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 35 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government norms, which can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000 per month, along with House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT Indore JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment must be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the information available.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Indore will primarily involve an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Indore is a contractual role. This means the appointment is for a fixed tenure, as specified in the appointment letter.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.

faq.question: Q10. What are the important dates for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification was released on 25th May 2026, the last date for applications is 10th June 2026, and the interview is scheduled for 12th June 2026.
